assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.IssuerUri = 'https://identity.mycompany.com' inside the AddIdentityServer options lambda
assertions.rationale: options.IssuerUri = 'https://identity.mycompany.com' is set in the options lambda

assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads the license key from configuration via builder.Configuration rather than hardcoding it
Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToDbContext or equivalent persistent storage
Program.cs calls SetApplicationName on the data protection builder to prevent key isolation across instances
